method.name: deterministic_capture_range_coordinate_normalization
method.visible_state_policy: Normalize only the captured visible-state range. Hidden or filtered rows remain structural data evidence, not visual absence.

coordinate_mappings.normalization_notes: Capture range is normalized as a visible-state bbox estimate.
Capture has a bbox but quality checks require review before downstream visual gates trust it.
Visible-state capture is dominated by hidden or filtered rows; preserve structural data separately and use only diagnostic reveal captures if needed.
Capture range is normalized as a visible-state bbox estimate.

Capture is usable but view-state affects part of the mapped range.

parser_observations.message: Coordinate normalization maps capture-range bboxes back to workbook cell ranges. It does not detect internal visual features.
9 mappings are blocked by hidden/filter view-state and should not be treated as visual absence.
